category_title: Autistic children in early language learning stages participating in proposal-response play sequences
scenario_title: Diverging from demonstrated play actions with a slinky
minimal_context: The tutor and student are playing with a slinky during a free-play session in a clinic playroom.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You got the slinky. (Reaches toward the slinky)

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Complies with the request by giving the slinky over)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: (Demonstrates a horizontal snake-like motion with the slinky, then flips it onto the table toward the child) Here.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Construes the slinky flipped onto the table as an offer, timing the move at the transitional moment to take the slinky and begin playing with it)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Can you do what I did?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Extends the slinky toward the ceiling in a vertical motion, stretching the coils, performing a different maneuver than the horizontal snake-like motion demonstrated)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: You got the slinky. (Reaches toward the slinky)

STUDENT: (Complies with the request by giving the slinky over)

TUTOR: (Demonstrates a horizontal snake-like motion with the slinky, then flips it onto the table toward the child) Here.

STUDENT: (Construes the slinky flipped onto the table as an offer, timing the move at the transitional moment to take the slinky and begin playing with it)

TUTOR: Can you do what I did?

STUDENT: (Extends the slinky toward the ceiling in a vertical motion, stretching the coils, performing a different maneuver than the horizontal snake-like motion demonstrated)

context.environment: Playroom located at a University clinic
context.materials: Standard set of toys including a slinky

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: Caregiver demonstrates a horizontal snake-like motion with the slinky
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Child extends the slinky toward the ceiling in a vertical motion, stretching the coils, which is a different maneuver than the horizontal snake-like motion demonstrated
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Construes the slinky flipped onto the table in his direction as an offer

behavior_patterns.condition: When caregiver demonstrates a specific play activity
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Performs a different maneuver than demonstrated
